actionUnits.condition: Invoke UI raycasting on Floor Canvas via EventSystem/GvrPointerInputModule so that GvrPointerGraphicRaycaster (MonoBehaviour id 976, guid 739800cd36aba44e9b04ce977e5784bd) executes Raycast(). Current scene config (from MonoBehaviour_0 id 976): raycastMode = Camera (0), ignoreReversedGraphics = true (1), blockingObjects = None (0), blockingMask = 0xFFFFFFFF. Requirements: Canvas attached to Floor Canvas must be RenderMode.WorldSpace (as required by the script), Camera.main present, and GvrPointerManager.Pointer available. Test by positioning the GVR pointer so its ray intersects at least one Graphic child under Floor Canvas to generate RaycastResults, then position the pointer so it misses to test the no-hit path.
